name: Crunchy Swiss and Ham Appetizers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except corn flake crumbs in a large bowl.
2. Chill the mixture for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
3. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
4. Roll each ball in corn flake crumbs until evenly coated.
5. Place the rolled appetizers on a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and heated through.
7. Serve while still hot. Makes about 8 dozen appetizers.
